name: Roasted Pumpkin Seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop out the seeds and pulp from a pumpkin and separate the pulp from the seeds, discarding the pulp.
2. Rinse the seeds in a large colander under cold running water, removing any remaining clinging strings. The seeds will feel slippery when wet.
3. Dry the seeds on paper toweling by dumping them in small amounts onto the towel. Spread them out and allow to air-dry for an hour or so until completely dry.
4. Once dried, toss the seeds with vegetable oil to coat well and sprinkle generously with salt.
5. Spread the coated seeds into a single layer on a baking sheet.
6. Place the baking sheet in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) and bake for 30 minutes, stirring every few minutes to ensure even cooking and prevent burning.
7. Remove from the oven and allow the roasted pumpkin seeds to cool before serving.
(These tasty treats are often enjoyed while still warm.)
